title: RPG Potions - New Potions
description: More Potions! New potions designed for PvP combat, adding tactical depth and strategic variety, although its effects are also useful in many other game situations beyond combat.
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/RPG_Potions/MP_RPGPotions_header.webp)

RPG Potions – For PvP adds a set of new potions designed to transform the way players face each other in combat. Rather than simply increasing damage or health, they introduce effects that influence vision, mobility, enemy reading, and real-time decision-making, making PvP more tactical and less predictable. Although designed for duels and competitive arenas, their utilities also work in PvE, raids, factions, and custom maps, adding variety and depth to overall gameplay.

Most potions allow you to configure the intensity, duration, or behavior of the effects from the mod's configuration files.

1 - Smoke Potion - When thrown, it releases a cloud of smoke that blocks immediate vision of the area, allowing you to confuse your opponent, break pursuits, or hide your movements.

2 - Decoy Potion - Generates a temporary decoy that mimics the player's presence and distracts the enemy, ideal for deception, baiting, or calculated escapes.

3 - Push Potion - Creates a shockwave that pushes nearby enemies away, useful for creating distance, displacing them on bridges/high ground, or cutting off a melee attack.

4 - Ghost Armor Potion - Applies a temporary layer of protection that completely reduces the damage from the first 2-3 hits received for a few seconds, allowing you to enter or exit combat without initial punishment.

5 - Mild Paralysis Potion - Reduces the opponent's mobility and reaction time for a few seconds, making it difficult for them to escape or respond immediately in the heat of battle.

6 - Projectile Rebound Potion - Causes projectiles you receive to temporarily rebound, allowing them to return to the shooter and damage them, turning the ranged exchange in your favor.

7 - Heat Marking Potion - Marks the enemy, revealing their position for a limited time, making it easier to chase, track, and control hidden players.

8 - Black Stain Potion - Darkens the opponent's screen, hindering their vision and ability to aim or orient themselves for a few seconds.
